Character type macros, integer format specifiers, standard library functions, and string manipulation.


## Files
- **[ctype.h](ctype.h.md)**: Character type classification and conversion macros for handling ASCII characters.
- **[inttypes.h](inttypes.h.md)**: Defines macros for format specifiers of integer types for printf and scanf functions.
- **[stdlib.h](stdlib.h.md)**: Standard library header for integer operations, conversion functions, and constants like EXIT_SUCCESS.
- **[string.h](string.h.md)**: String manipulation and conversion functions for memory and character arrays.
